blended.narrative: Mont Sutton is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
